title: Accessible Tree View

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Tree View

Implement an accessible tree view that allows users to navigate through a hierarchical structure using keyboard-only. The tree view should have the following features:
### Requirements
1. Ability to navigate through the tree using the arrow keys (up, down, left, right)
2. Indicate the current selection with a high contrast color and font size
3. Support for keyboard shortcuts (e.g., <kbd>Alt + Arrow</kbd>) to toggle subnodes
4. Accessibility features such as ARIA attributes for screen readers
5. Styling using a modern CSS framework (e.g., Tailwind CSS)

constraints: Use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript only. No third-party libraries or frameworks.
The tree view should be fully accessible using keyboard-only navigation.
Test cases will be provided separately.

gradingCriteria.description: The tree view is fully accessible using keyboard-only navigation.
The tree view is styled using a modern CSS framework (e.g., Tailwind CSS) and has a high contrast color scheme.
The tree view has the following features: navigation using arrow keys, indication of current selection, support for keyboard shortcuts to toggle subnodes.
